steps.name: Keyboard shortcuts (j/k/1-4)
observations: After pressing j then 2, no obvious change occurred — keyboard shortcuts not implemented.

friction_points: Verdict panel sits below the fold at y=1462 (viewport 900 px) — user must scroll to reach it. Fitts's Law: distant target.
After save, page stays on the same paper. No auto-advance to next unverdicted paper — every batch save requires a manual click in the left list.
After pressing j then 2, no obvious change occurred — keyboard shortcuts not implemented.
